journal: Talked to Old Hermit: Q: 'What do the winds whisper?' A: 'The winds whisper of old forgotten gleam, hidden where the setting sun bids its final, golden dream....'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'What do you have to say?' A: 'Well hello there, friend! Just the person I was hoping...'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'What services do you offer or quests do you have?' A: 'Ah, a discerning customer! I, your humble Traveling Merchant, have everything a hero could ever need...'
Talked to innkeeper at Southern Inn: '[You received Herbal Tea.]...'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'What services do you offer or quests do you have?' A: 'Ah, friend, you've come to the right merchant...'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'What do you sell?' A: 'Ah, my friend, you ask the right question! I've got a little bit of everything for the discerning ad...'
Talked to Traveling Merchant: Q: 'Do you have any quests for me?' A: 'Ah, my friend, always looking for opportunity, I see! And good for you, because I just so happen to ...'

turns.observation:
You are at position (7, 0).
Current location: The starting clearing. Familiar ground.
  North: Open path ·
  South: Edge of the world (impassable).
  East: NPC 🧙
  West: Edge of the world (impassable).
turns.result: Moved east to (7, 1). A weathered hut sits beneath an ancient oak. An old man meditates outside. You encounter Old Hermit. Ah, a traveler... The winds whisper of your coming. Sit, and I shall speak of shadows and flame.

turns.result: Old Hermit says: The winds whisper of old forgotten gleam, hidden where the setting sun bids its final, golden dream. Fortune often hides where shadows lengthen.

turns.observation:
You are at position (5, 3).
Current location: A colorful wagon is parked here. A merchant waves you over.
  North: Mountain (impassable) ⛰️
  South: Open path ·
  East: Open path ·
  West: Open path ·
turns.action: talk({'question': 'What services do you offer or quests do you have?'})
turns.result: Traveling Merchant says: Ah, a discerning customer! I, your humble Traveling Merchant, have everything a hero could ever need – powerful trinkets and essential gear to make your journey smoother, all at prices you simply won't believe! And for the adventuring type, I've a discreet delivery to the Old Hermit, south of here, for a tidy sum of 2 shimmering gold coins.

turns.result: The innkeeper at Southern Inn speaks: "My brother at the Northern Inn is terribly ill. Please, take this Herbal Tea to him. I'll pay you 2 gold!" [You received Herbal Tea.]

turns.observation:
You are at position (5, 3).
Current location: A colorful wagon is parked here. A merchant waves you over.
  North: Mountain (impassable) ⛰️
  South: Open path ·
  East: Open path ·
  West: Open path ·
turns.result: Traveling Merchant says: Ah, my friend, you ask the right question! I've got a little bit of everything for the discerning adventurer – potent elixirs for mending weary bones, maps that whisper secrets of forgotten paths, and a few peculiar trinkets that might just save your hide when things get... *dark*. Always the best deals for a good customer, of course!

turns.result: Traveling Merchant says: Ah, my friend, always looking for opportunity, I see! And good for you, because I just so happen to have a little errand that could earn you a few jingling coins. I need this letter delivered to the Old Hermit, quite the recluse he is, lives somewhere in the southern reaches. Two shiny gold coins for your trouble – a steal, I tell you!
